layers.name: Core Abstractions
layers.summary: The fundamental Rx contracts — Observable/Observer/Event/Scheduler protocols and the base sequence machinery every other subsystem builds on.

classes.name: AnyObserver
classes.description_zh: 对 ObserverType 进行类型擦除的结构体，将任意具体 Observer 统一包装为单一的事件处理闭包，用于跨类型传递观察者。
classes.description_en: A type-erased ObserverType struct that wraps any concrete observer behind a single event-handler closure, enabling observers of different concrete types to be passed and stored uniformly.

classes.name: Binder
classes.description_zh: 专为 UI 绑定设计的 ObserverType 实现，弱持有目标对象、强制在指定调度器（默认主线程）上执行绑定，并在调试模式下禁止错误事件传入。
classes.description_en: A UI-binding-oriented ObserverType that weakly retains its target, dispatches value delivery on a specified scheduler (main by default), and fatal-errors on received error events in debug builds.

classes.name: Cancelable
classes.description_zh: 在 Disposable 基础上增加 isDisposed 状态查询能力的协议，代表可追踪释放状态的可取消资源。
classes.description_en: A Disposable sub-protocol that adds an isDisposed property, representing a cancellable resource whose disposal state can be inspected at runtime.

classes.name: RxError
classes.description_zh: RxSwift 框架级错误枚举，涵盖溢出、越界、序列为空、已释放对象访问及超时等通用 Rx 运行时错误。
classes.description_en: The framework-level error enum enumerating canonical RxSwift runtime failures — overflow, argument out of range, no elements, disposed-object access, and timeout.

classes.name: ImmediateSchedulerType
classes.description_zh: 最基础的调度器协议，要求实现者能够立即同步或异步地调度一个工作单元，是整个调度器层级的根协议。
classes.description_en: The root scheduler protocol requiring a single schedule(_:action:) method for immediate dispatch of a unit of work, serving as the base of the entire RxSwift scheduler hierarchy.

classes.name: Observable
classes.description_zh: ObservableType 的类型擦除具体类，是 RxSwift 中所有推送式序列的公共基类，通过抽象的 subscribe 方法强制子类实现订阅逻辑。
classes.description_en: The concrete type-erased base class for all push-based sequences in RxSwift, implementing ObservableType with an abstract subscribe method that subclasses must override to define emission logic.

classes.name: NSObject
classes.description_zh: 将所有 NSObject 子类标记为 ReactiveCompatible，使其自动获得 .rx 命名空间以添加响应式扩展。
classes.description_en: An NSObject extension conforming every NSObject subclass to ReactiveCompatible, granting the .rx proxy namespace across all Foundation and UIKit objects automatically.

classes.name: rxAbstractMethod
classes.signature: func rxAbstractMethod(file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line) -> Swift.Never

classes.name: rxFatalError
classes.signature: func rxFatalError(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line) -> Swift.Never

classes.name: rxFatalErrorInDebug
classes.signature: func rxFatalErrorInDebug(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line)

classes.name: incrementChecked
classes.signature: func incrementChecked(_ i: inout Int) throws -> Int

classes.name: decrementChecked
classes.signature: func decrementChecked(_ i: inout Int) throws -> Int

classes.name: SynchronizationTracker
classes.description_zh: 仅在 DEBUG 模式下启用的并发诊断工具类，通过追踪跨线程的重入调用来检测违反 Rx 事件语法（next* (error|completed)?）的同步异常。
classes.description_en: A DEBUG-only diagnostic class that tracks per-thread reentrancy to detect synchronization anomalies — concurrent or overlapping event emissions that violate the Rx observable grammar.

classes.name: SchedulerType
classes.description_zh: 在 ImmediateSchedulerType 基础上扩展时间感知能力的调度器协议，支持相对延迟调度和周期性任务调度，是所有带时间语义调度器的统一契约。
classes.description_en: A time-aware scheduler protocol extending ImmediateSchedulerType with scheduleRelative and schedulePeriodic, forming the unified contract for all schedulers that understand wall-clock time.

classes.name: dispatch
classes.signature: @inline(__always) func dispatch<Element>(_ bag: Bag<(Event<Element>) -> Void>, _ event: Event<Element>)

classes.name: disposeAll
classes.signature: func disposeAll(in bag: Bag<Disposable>)

layers.name: Operators
layers.summary: The operator catalogue — map/filter/merge/flatMap/combineLatest/… each a small Producer that transforms or combines Observable sequences.

classes.name: BufferTimeCountSink
classes.description_zh: Buffer 算子的订阅级工作者，负责在时间窗口到期或元素数量达到上限时将积累的元素批量打包成数组发射给下游观察者。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Buffer operator that accumulates source elements and flushes them as an array to the downstream observer when the time window expires or the element count reaches its maximum.

classes.name: CatchSink
classes.description_zh: Catch 算子的订阅级工作者，负责在源序列发生错误时切换到备用序列（catchHandler 返回的 Observable）并继续转发元素。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Catch operator that forwards source elements and, upon receiving an error event, switches to the fallback Observable returned by the catch handler to continue the sequence.

classes.name: CombineLatestCollectionTypeSink
classes.description_zh: 集合版 CombineLatest 算子的订阅级工作者，跟踪源序列集合中每个序列的最新值，当所有源均已各自发射至少一个元素后，每次任意源发射时执行结果选择函数并向下游发射组合结果。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the collection-based CombineLatest operator that tracks the latest value from each observable in the collection and emits a combined result via the result selector whenever any source emits, once all sources have produced at least one element.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: ObservableType.combineLatest 系列重载(2~8 个源,可选结果选择器):任一源发出时,用各源最新值组合出新元素。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.combineLatest overloads (2–8 sources, with or without a result selector) that emit a value built from every source's latest element whenever any source emits.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: ObservableType.combineLatest 系列重载(2~8 个源,可选结果选择器):任一源发出时,用各源最新值组合出新元素。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.combineLatest overloads (2–8 sources, with or without a result selector) that emit a value built from every source's latest element whenever any source emits.

classes.description_zh: ObservableType.combineLatest 系列重载(2~8 个源,可选结果选择器):任一源发出时,用各源最新值组合出新元素。

classes.description_en: The ObservableType.combineLatest overloads (2–8 sources, with or without a result selector) that emit a value built from every source's latest element whenever any source emits.

classes.description_zh: ObservableType.combineLatest 系列重载(2~8 个源,可选结果选择器):任一源发出时,用各源最新值组合出新元素。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.combineLatest overloads (2–8 sources, with or without a result selector) that emit a value built from every source's latest element whenever any source emits.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: ObservableType.combineLatest 系列重载(2~8 个源,可选结果选择器):任一源发出时,用各源最新值组合出新元素。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.combineLatest overloads (2–8 sources, with or without a result selector) that emit a value built from every source's latest element whenever any source emits.

classes.name: CombineLatestSink
classes.description_zh: CombineLatest 系列算子共用的抽象 Sink 基类，维护每个源序列是否已发射过元素及是否已完成的状态，并在所有源均有最新值时通过 getResult() 计算并发射组合结果。
classes.description_en: The abstract base Sink shared by all CombineLatest arity variants that tracks per-source has-value and completion state and emits a combined result via getResult() each time any source emits once all sources have produced at least one value.

classes.name: CombineLatestObserver
classes.description_zh: CombineLatest 算子中每个源序列对应的独立观察者，负责线程安全地更新该源的最新值并通知父 Sink 协调合并逻辑。
classes.description_en: The per-source observer used by CombineLatest that thread-safely stores the latest value for its assigned source index and notifies the parent CombineLatestProtocol sink to coordinate result emission.

classes.name: DebounceSink
classes.description_zh: Debounce 算子的订阅级工作者，每次接收新元素时重置定时器，只有在静默期（dueTime）结束后才将最后一个元素发射给下游，从而过滤掉快速连续到来的元素。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Debounce operator that resets a scheduler timer on each incoming element and only forwards the most recent element to the downstream observer after a quiet interval of dueTime has elapsed without any new source emission.

classes.name: logEvent
classes.signature: private func logEvent(_ identifier: String, dateFormat: DateFormatter, content: String)

classes.name: GroupBySink
classes.description_zh: GroupBy 算子的订阅级工作者，根据 keySelector 将源元素分组，为每个新键创建一个 GroupedObservable（底层是 PublishSubject）并发射给下游，同时将后续同键元素路由到对应 Subject。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the GroupBy operator that partitions source elements by key selector, creating a new GroupedObservable backed by a PublishSubject for each new key and routing subsequent same-key elements to the corresponding subject.

classes.name: MergeLimitedSink
classes.description_zh: 受并发数限制的 Merge/flatMap 算子的订阅级工作者，将内层序列的并发订阅数控制在 maxConcurrent 以内，超出上限的序列进入队列等待当前活跃订阅完成后再依次订阅。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for concurrency-limited merge and flatMap operators that subscribes to at most maxConcurrent inner observables simultaneously and queues additional inner sequences until active subscriptions complete.

classes.name: MergeSink
classes.description_zh: 无并发上限的 Merge/flatMap 算子共用的抽象 Sink 基类，并发订阅所有内层序列并将各内层发射的元素直接透传给下游观察者，全部内层完成后发射 completed。
classes.description_en: The abstract base Sink for unbounded merge and flatMap operators that concurrently subscribes to all inner observable sequences and forwards their elements directly to the downstream observer, completing only after all inner sequences have completed.

classes.name: ConnectableObservableAdapter
classes.description_zh: Multicast 算子返回的 ConnectableObservable 实现，持有一个 Subject 作为多播枢纽，调用 connect() 后才将源序列订阅到该 Subject，使多个下游订阅者共享同一上游订阅。
classes.description_en: The ConnectableObservable implementation returned by multicast operators that holds a Subject as the multicast hub, subscribing the source observable to the subject only when connect() is called so that multiple downstream subscribers share a single upstream subscription.

classes.name: Producer
classes.description_zh: RxSwift 所有「冷」算子 Observable 的抽象基类，其 subscribe 方法通过 CurrentThreadScheduler 保证递归安全，并委托 run(_:cancel:) 抽象方法创建具体的 Sink 及上游订阅。
classes.description_en: The abstract base class for all cold-operator Observables in RxSwift that implements subscribe by scheduling via CurrentThreadScheduler for re-entrance safety and delegates to the abstract run(_:cancel:) method to create the concrete Sink and upstream subscription.

classes.name: SampleSequenceSink
classes.description_zh: Sample 算子的订阅级工作者，缓存源序列的最新元素，当采样序列（sampler）发射信号时将最新元素（如有）发射给下游，从而实现按需采样。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Sample operator that caches the latest element from the source sequence and emits it to the downstream observer each time the sampler observable signals, effectively gating output to sampling ticks.

classes.name: Sink
classes.description_zh: RxSwift 所有算子 Sink 的抽象基类，封装下游观察者引用及取消令牌，提供线程安全的 forwardOn 转发方法和 Disposable 释放机制。
classes.description_en: The abstract base class for all operator Sinks in RxSwift that holds a reference to the downstream observer and a cancellation token, providing thread-safe forwardOn event forwarding and Disposable-based teardown.

classes.name: SkipUntilSink
classes.description_zh: SkipUntil 算子的订阅级工作者，在触发序列（other）发射第一个元素之前抑制源序列的所有元素，触发后开始透传后续元素给下游。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the SkipUntil operator that suppresses all source elements until the trigger observable emits its first element, after which subsequent source elements are forwarded to the downstream observer.

classes.name: SubscribeOnSink
classes.description_zh: SubscribeOn 算子的订阅级工作者，将上游序列的订阅与取消订阅操作调度到指定调度器上执行，同时在接收到元素时直接转发给下游观察者。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the SubscribeOn operator that dispatches the upstream source subscription and disposal to a specified scheduler while forwarding received elements directly to the downstream observer on whatever thread they arrive.

classes.name: SwitchSink
classes.description_zh: SwitchLatest/flatMapLatest 算子共用的抽象 Sink 基类，每当外层序列发射新的内层序列时，取消前一个内层订阅并切换到新的内层序列，始终只转发最新内层序列的元素。
classes.description_en: The abstract base Sink shared by switchLatest and flatMapLatest operators that unsubscribes from the previous inner observable and subscribes to the new one each time the outer sequence emits, ensuring only the most recently emitted inner sequence's elements reach the downstream observer.

classes.name: TakeUntilSink
classes.description_zh: TakeUntil 算子的订阅级工作者，持续转发源序列元素给下游，直到触发序列（other）发射元素后立即完成并取消所有订阅。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the TakeUntil operator that forwards source elements to the downstream observer until the trigger observable emits its first element, at which point the sequence completes and all subscriptions are disposed.

classes.name: ThrottleSink
classes.description_zh: Throttle 算子的订阅级工作者，保证任意两次发射之间至少间隔 dueTime，立即发射首个元素，并在时间窗口内缓存最新元素以便窗口结束时按需补发。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Throttle operator that ensures no two emissions are closer than dueTime apart by emitting the first element immediately and, when latest mode is enabled, scheduling a deferred emit of the most recent unsent element at the end of each time window.

classes.name: TimeoutSink
classes.description_zh: Timeout 算子的订阅级工作者，在源序列每次发射元素后重置超时计时器，若在 dueTime 内无元素到达则切换到备用序列（other）或发射超时错误。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Timeout operator that resets a deadline timer after each source element and, if no element arrives within dueTime, switches to the fallback observable or emits a timeout error to the downstream observer.

classes.name: WindowTimeCountSink
classes.description_zh: Window 算子的订阅级工作者，将源元素分配到由 PublishSubject 支撑的滑动窗口 Observable 中，当窗口满或时间到期时完成当前窗口并开启新窗口，每个窗口 Observable 作为元素发射给下游。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the Window operator that routes source elements into PublishSubject-backed window observables, completing the current window and opening a new one whenever the element count or time span limit is reached, emitting each window observable downstream.

classes.name: WithLatestFromSink
classes.description_zh: WithLatestFrom 算子的订阅级工作者，订阅第二个源以持续跟踪其最新值，当第一个源（self）发射元素时将其与第二个源的最新值通过 resultSelector 组合后发射给下游。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the WithLatestFrom operator that tracks the latest value of the second source sequence and, on each emission from the first source, combines it with that cached value via the result selector and forwards the result to the downstream observer.

classes.name: ZipCollectionTypeSink
classes.description_zh: 集合版 Zip 算子的订阅级工作者，为集合中每个源序列维护一个元素队列，只有当所有源在同一索引位置均已产生元素时才调用结果选择函数并发射组合结果（按索引严格配对）。
classes.description_en: The subscription-time worker for the collection-based Zip operator that maintains an element queue per source and emits a combined result via the result selector only when all sources in the collection have each produced an element at the same positional index.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: ObservableType.zip 系列重载:按下标严格配对多个源的元素,仅当每个源都产出对应位置的元素时才发出组合结果。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.zip overloads that pair elements from multiple sources strictly by index, emitting a combined result only once every source has produced an element at that position.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: ObservableType.zip 系列重载:按下标严格配对多个源的元素,仅当每个源都产出对应位置的元素时才发出组合结果。
classes.description_en: The ObservableType.zip overloads that pair elements from multiple sources strictly by index, emitting a combined result only once every source has produced an element at that position.

classes.name: ZipSink
classes.description_zh: Zip 系列算子共用的抽象 Sink 基类，跟踪每个源是否已提供当前索引的元素，仅在所有源在同一索引处均有值时才通过 getResult() 计算并发射组合结果。
classes.description_en: The abstract base Sink shared by all Zip arity variants that tracks per-source element availability at each index and emits a combined result via getResult() only when every source has produced an element at the current positional index.

classes.name: ZipObserver
classes.description_zh: Zip 算子中每个源序列对应的独立观察者，负责线程安全地将新到达的元素存入父 Sink 维护的队列，并通知父 ZipSinkProtocol 协调索引配对与合并逻辑。
classes.description_en: The per-source observer used by Zip that thread-safely enqueues each arriving element into the parent Sink's positional queue and notifies the parent ZipSinkProtocol to coordinate index-aligned pairing and result emission.

layers.name: Observers
layers.summary: Observer implementations and tail-recursive sinks that receive and forward events down a subscription.

classes.name: TailRecursiveSink
classes.description_zh: 为 concat/concatMap 等顺序展开多个 Observable 序列的算子提供尾递归优化的基类 Sink，通过显式栈和 AsyncLock 门控避免深层调用栈溢出。
classes.description_en: A base Sink for operators (e.g. concat, concatMap) that sequentially iterate a generator of Observables, using an explicit generator stack and AsyncLock gate to flatten recursion and prevent stack overflows.

layers.name: Subjects & Relays
layers.summary: Multicasting hot sources that are both Observable and Observer — Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async subjects and their error-free Relay wrappers.

classes.name: rxFatalErrorInDebug
classes.signature: func rxFatalErrorInDebug(_ lastMessage: @autoclosure () -> String, file: StaticString = #file, line: UInt = #line)

classes.name: BehaviorSubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，缓存最新一个值并在新订阅者订阅时立即将其重放，同时将后续事件广播给所有活跃观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that caches the single most-recent value and immediately replays it to each new subscriber, then broadcasts all subsequent events to all active observers.

classes.name: PublishSubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，不缓存任何历史值，仅将订阅后产生的事件广播给当时已注册的所有观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that buffers no history and only broadcasts events occurring after subscription to all currently registered observers.

classes.name: ReplaySubject
classes.description_zh: 热序列多播 Subject，以可配置的缓冲区（有界或无界）重放历史值给新订阅者，并将后续事件广播给所有观察者。
classes.description_en: A hot multicast subject that replays a configurable buffer of past values (bounded or unbounded) to each new subscriber and then forwards subsequent events to all observers.

layers.name: Schedulers
layers.summary: Abstractions over where and when work runs — serial/concurrent dispatch, main-thread, operation-queue and virtual-time schedulers.

classes.name: MainScheduler
classes.description_zh: 将工作调度到主线程（DispatchQueue.main）的串行调度器，当调用已在主队列上发生时直接同步执行以避免额外的异步跳转，专为 UI 操作优化。
classes.description_en: A serial scheduler targeting DispatchQueue.main that executes work synchronously in-place when already on the main queue, optimized for UI work via the observeOn operator.

classes.name: SerialDispatchQueueScheduler
classes.description_zh: 基于串行 DispatchQueue 的调度器，无论传入队列是否并发都会创建内部串行代理队列，保证操作符所依赖的串行执行语义。
classes.description_en: A scheduler backed by a serial DispatchQueue that wraps any incoming queue (even concurrent) in an internal serial proxy, guaranteeing the serial execution semantics required by certain RxSwift operators.

classes.name: VirtualTimeScheduler
classes.description_zh: 基于优先队列的虚拟时间调度器基类，通过手动推进虚拟时钟来按绝对或相对虚拟时间顺序执行已调度的工作，主要用于测试场景。
classes.description_en: A base virtual-time scheduler backed by a priority queue that executes scheduled work in virtual-clock order by manually advancing the clock, serving as the foundation for deterministic testing schedulers.

classes.name: DispatchQueueConfiguration
classes.description_zh: 持有底层 DispatchQueue 和计时器精度（leeway）的内部值类型，为 SerialDispatchQueueScheduler 提供立即调度、延迟调度和周期性调度的具体实现。
classes.description_en: An internal value type holding a DispatchQueue and leeway that provides the concrete implementations of immediate, delayed, and periodic scheduling used by SerialDispatchQueueScheduler.

classes.name: ScheduledItem
classes.description_zh: 封装单个可调度工作单元（action + state）的内部值类型，实现 ScheduledItemType 以支持调用与取消，由 CurrentThreadScheduler 的队列使用。
classes.description_en: An internal value type encapsulating a single schedulable work unit (action and state) that implements ScheduledItemType for invocation and cancellation, used by the CurrentThreadScheduler's trampoline queue.

layers.name: Disposables
layers.summary: Subscription lifecycle and cancellation — the Disposable family plus DisposeBag/CompositeDisposable resource management.

classes.name: CompositeDisposable
classes.description_zh: 将多个 Disposable 聚合为一组，调用 dispose() 时原子性地取消全部成员订阅，并在已释放后立即处理任何新插入的 Disposable。
classes.description_en: Aggregates multiple disposables into a single group, atomically cancelling all members on dispose and immediately disposing any newly inserted disposable when the composite is already disposed.

classes.name: RefCountDisposable
classes.description_zh: 引用计数式 Disposable，仅当主 dispose 已调用且所有通过 retain() 获取的依赖 Disposable 均已释放时，才真正释放底层资源。
classes.description_en: A reference-counting disposable that defers disposal of its underlying resource until the primary dispose has been called and all dependent disposables obtained via retain() have been released.

classes.name: SerialDisposable
classes.description_zh: 持有单个可替换 Disposable 的串行容器，每次替换内部 disposable 时自动取消前一个，整体 dispose 后所有后续赋值也会立即被取消。
classes.description_en: A serial disposable container holding one inner disposable at a time, automatically cancelling the previous one upon replacement and immediately disposing any future assignments once the container itself is disposed.

classes.name: SingleAssignmentDisposable
classes.description_zh: 仅允许设置一次底层 Disposable 的单次赋值容器，若在赋值前 dispose 则在赋值时立即取消，用于桥接异步创建的订阅与其取消令牌。
classes.description_en: A single-assignment disposable container that permits setting its inner disposable exactly once, immediately cancelling it if disposal occurred before the assignment, used to bridge asynchronously created subscriptions with their cancellation tokens.

layers.name: Traits
layers.summary: Type-safe Observable refinements — Single/Maybe/Completable/Infallible and the Cocoa-side Driver/Signal shared sequences.

classes.name: ControlProperty
classes.description_zh: 双向可绑定的 UI 控件值 trait，保证在主调度器上交付、永不报错、具备 shareReplay(1) 语义，同时充当可读的 Observable 和可写的 Observer，代表控件的初始值及用户触发的变更。
classes.description_en: A two-way-bindable UI control value trait that acts as both an Observable (reads the current and user-initiated value changes with shareReplay(1) on the main scheduler) and an Observer (writes values back to the control), guaranteeing no errors and completion when the control is deallocated.

classes.name: DriverSharingStrategy
classes.description_zh: Driver 的共享策略实现，指定使用主调度器交付事件，并采用 share(replay:1, scope:.whileConnected) 确保多订阅者共享计算资源且新订阅者立即重放最新值。
classes.description_en: The sharing-strategy implementation for Driver that pins event delivery to the main scheduler and uses share(replay:1, scope:.whileConnected) so multiple subscribers share computation and each new subscriber immediately receives the last emitted element.

classes.name: SharingScheduler
classes.description_zh: SharedSequence 系列 trait（Driver/Signal）使用的调度器工厂命名空间，默认产出 MainScheduler，并在单元测试中提供 mock 替换机制。
classes.description_en: A factory namespace for the scheduler used by SharedSequence-based traits (Driver/Signal), defaulting to MainScheduler in production and providing a mock-replacement hook for unit tests.

classes.name: _forceCompilerToStopDoingInsaneOptimizationsThatBreakCode
classes.signature: func _forceCompilerToStopDoingInsaneOptimizationsThatBreakCode(_ scheduler: () -> SchedulerType)
classes.description_zh: 一个内部工具函数，通过引用传入的调度器工厂闭包来阻止编译器将 SharingScheduler.mock 的 defer 块优化掉，确保测试结束后调度器恢复原状。
classes.description_en: An internal workaround function that references the scheduler factory closure to prevent the Swift compiler from optimizing away the defer block in SharingScheduler.mock, ensuring the original scheduler is correctly restored after test execution.

classes.name: SharedSequence
classes.description_zh: RxCocoa 中共享序列的核心泛型结构，以 SharingStrategyProtocol 参数化共享策略与调度器，是 Driver 和 Signal 的共同底层类型，保证序列永不报错并在指定调度器上交付事件。
classes.description_en: The core generic struct underpinning both Driver and Signal, parameterized by a SharingStrategyProtocol that controls the delivery scheduler and multicast sharing strategy, guaranteeing a never-failing, scheduler-bound observable shared among all subscribers.

classes.name: SignalSharingStrategy
classes.description_zh: Signal 的共享策略实现，指定使用主调度器交付事件，并采用 share(scope:.whileConnected) 共享计算资源但不重放历史元素，适用于建模一次性 UI 事件总线场景。
classes.description_en: The sharing-strategy implementation for Signal that pins event delivery to the main scheduler and uses share(scope:.whileConnected) without replay, making it suitable for modeling imperative one-shot UI event buses where new subscribers do not receive past events.

classes.name: Infallible
classes.description_zh: Infallible.combineLatest 工厂重载(2~8 个源):任一源发出时,把各不可失败序列的最新值合并为新的 Infallible。
classes.description_en: The Infallible.combineLatest factory overloads (2–8 sources) that merge each non-failing source's latest value into a new Infallible whenever any source emits.

classes.name: Infallible
classes.description_zh: Infallible.combineLatest 工厂重载(2~8 个源):任一源发出时,把各不可失败序列的最新值合并为新的 Infallible。

classes.name: ConcatCompletable
classes.description_zh: Completable 的 andThen 操作符的内部 Producer 实现，在 Completable 成功完成后无缝串联订阅第二个序列，实现两个序列的顺序执行。
classes.description_en: The internal Producer backing the andThen operator for Completable, which subscribes to a second observable sequence only after the leading Completable terminates successfully, enabling sequential chaining of asynchronous operations.

classes.name: ConcatCompletableSink
classes.description_zh: ConcatCompletable 的内部 Sink，负责监听前置 Completable 的完成事件，完成后切换订阅至第二个序列并将其事件转发给下游观察者。
classes.description_en: The internal Sink for ConcatCompletable that listens to the leading Completable, and upon its successful completion switches subscription to the second observable sequence, forwarding all downstream events.

classes.name: PrimitiveSequenceType
classes.description_zh: Completable 的 API 集合:基于 CompletableEvent 的 create/subscribe,以及工厂(empty/error/never)与组合子(concat/zip),服务于只完成或只报错的序列。
classes.description_en: Completable's API surface — create/subscribe over the CompletableEvent callback plus factories (empty/error/never) and combinators (concat/zip) for sequences that only complete or error.

classes.name: PrimitiveSequenceType
classes.description_zh: Completable 的 API 集合:基于 CompletableEvent 的 create/subscribe,以及工厂(empty/error/never)与组合子(concat/zip),服务于只完成或只报错的序列。

classes.description_zh: Maybe 的 API 集合:基于 MaybeEvent 的 create/subscribe,以及工厂与保持"零或一个元素"语义的变换/恢复操作符。
classes.description_en: Maybe's API surface — create/subscribe over the MaybeEvent callback plus factories and transformation/recovery operators that preserve its zero-or-one-element guarantee.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: 为 ObservableType（Element == Never）添加 asCompletable() 扩展方法，将不会发射任何元素的 Observable<Never> 直接转换为 Completable 以明确语义。
classes.description_en: Extends ObservableType where Element == Never with asCompletable(), converting a Never-typed observable (which can only complete or error) directly into a Completable to make the zero-element guarantee explicit in the type system.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: 为 ObservableType（Element == Never）添加 asCompletable() 扩展方法，将不会发射任何元素的 Observable<Never> 直接转换为 Completable 以明确语义。
classes.description_en: Extends ObservableType where Element == Never with asCompletable(), converting a Never-typed observable (which can only complete or error) directly into a Completable to make the zero-element guarantee explicit in the type system.

classes.name: PrimitiveSequenceType
classes.description_zh: 为 Completable 添加 Swift Concurrency 互操作支持：提供可用 await 等待完成事件的 value 异步属性，序列完成时返回 Void，出错时抛出异常。
classes.description_en: Adds Swift Concurrency interop to Completable with an async-throws value property that resolves to Void upon successful completion or throws on error, bridging the reactive completion event into Swift's structured concurrency.

classes.name: PrimitiveSequence

classes.description_en: The core generic wrapper struct for all finite primitive trait sequences (Single, Maybe, Completable), using a phantom Trait type parameter to encode element-count constraints at compile time while delegating to an underlying Observable<Element>.

classes.name: PrimitiveSequenceType
classes.description_zh: 所有 PrimitiveSequence trait（Single/Maybe/Completable）共同遵循的协议，声明 Trait 和 Element 关联类型及 primitiveSequence 访问器，是操作符扩展的统一约束入口。
classes.description_en: The base protocol for all primitive trait sequences, declaring the Trait and Element associated types plus a primitiveSequence accessor, serving as the common constraint point for operator extensions shared across Single, Maybe, and Completable.

layers.name: Concurrency & Locks

classes.description_en: An internal protocol mixin requiring a RecursiveLock property and providing default lock()/unlock() implementations via protocol extension, simplifying thread-safety boilerplate for concurrency-aware types.

classes.name: ControlTarget
classes.description_zh: target-action 桥接器，将 `UIControl`/`NSControl` 的控件事件（`UIControl.Event`）转换为 RxSwift 可订阅回调，是 `ControlEvent` 的底层实现基础。
classes.description_en: Target-action bridge that hooks a `UIControl`/`NSControl` event (e.g., `.touchUpInside`) and fires a callback into an Rx pipeline, serving as the foundation for `ControlEvent` observables.

classes.name: DelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: 代理代理基类，拦截 UIKit/AppKit 对象的委托方法调用，并将其广播为 Observable 序列，同时保持对原始 forwardDelegate 的透明转发。
classes.description_en: Base class for all delegate proxies that intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate method invocations and broadcasts them as Observable sequences while transparently forwarding to the original delegate.

classes.name: DelegateProxyType
classes.description_zh: 代理代理类型协议，定义代理注册、生命周期管理与 `proxy(for:)` 工厂方法，确保每个父对象只存在一个代理实例并可通过工厂按类型扩展。
classes.description_en: Protocol that defines the contract for all delegate proxy types — registration, lifecycle, and the `proxy(for:)` factory — ensuring a single shared proxy instance per parent object and extensible factory dispatch.

classes.name: HasDelegate
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `delegate` 属性，使 `DelegateProxyType` 默认实现可自动读写代理，无需子类手写 `currentDelegate`/`setCurrentDelegate`。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol declaring that a host object has a `delegate` property, allowing `DelegateProxyType` default implementations to automatically get/set the delegate without subclass boilerplate.

classes.name: HasDataSource
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `dataSource` 属性，使 `DelegateProxyType` 默认实现可自动管理数据源代理（适用于 `UITableView`、`UICollectionView` 等）。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol declaring that a host object has a `dataSource` property, enabling `DelegateProxyType` default implementations to manage the data source proxy for types like `UITableView` and `UICollectionView`.

classes.name: HasPrefetchDataSource
classes.description_zh: 标记协议，声明宿主对象拥有 `prefetchDataSource` 属性，使预取数据源（iOS 10+）可统一接入 `DelegateProxyType` 默认代理管理流程。
classes.description_en: Marker protocol (iOS 10+) declaring that a host object has a `prefetchDataSource` property, integrating prefetch data source management into the standard `DelegateProxyType` proxy lifecycle.

classes.name: DelegateProxyFactory
classes.description_zh: 私有工厂类，按父对象类型键控存储代理构造器，在 `proxy(for:)` 时沿类继承链查找并实例化对应的 `DelegateProxy` 子类（支持 `UITableView`→`UIScrollView` 层级复用）。
classes.description_en: Internal factory keyed by parent-object type that stores registered proxy constructors and resolves the correct `DelegateProxy` subclass by walking the parent's class hierarchy during `proxy(for:)`.

classes.name: ObservableType
classes.description_zh: `ObservableType` 扩展，提供 `subscribeProxyDataSource` 方法，将 Observable 序列绑定到 UIView 的数据源代理，并在主线程调度、错误处理和视图释放时自动清理。
classes.description_en: `ObservableType` extension adding `subscribeProxyDataSource`, which binds an Observable to a UIView's data source proxy with main-thread scheduling, error handling, and automatic cleanup on view deallocation.

classes.name: Error
classes.description_zh: `Error` 扩展，将 ObjC 运行时底层的 `NSError`（来自 `RXObjCRuntimeErrorDomain`）转换为类型安全的 `RxCocoaObjCRuntimeError` 枚举值，供 Rx 消息拦截层使用。
classes.description_en: `Error` extension that converts raw `NSError` values from the `RXObjCRuntimeErrorDomain` into typed `RxCocoaObjCRuntimeError` cases, bridging the low-level ObjC runtime error domain into the Rx message-interception layer.

classes.name: RxTarget
classes.description_zh: 所有 RxCocoa target-action 桥接器的基类，通过自持引用保持自身存活直到显式调用 `dispose()`，配合 `Disposable` 协议实现订阅生命周期管理。
classes.description_en: Base class for all RxCocoa target-action bridges that keeps itself alive via a self-retain cycle until `dispose()` is called, implementing `Disposable` to tie the bridge lifetime to an Rx subscription.

classes.name: Int
classes.description_zh: `Int` 遵循 `KVORepresentable` 的扩展，定义从 KVO 回调的 `NSNumber` 到 Swift `Int` 的类型安全转换，使整型属性可参与 KVO Observable 流。
classes.description_en: Conformance extension making `Int` `KVORepresentable` by defining a type-safe conversion from KVO's `NSNumber` bridge type, enabling integer properties to be observed via `rx.observe`.

classes.name: Bool
classes.description_zh: `Bool` 遵循 `KVORepresentable` 的扩展，定义从 `NSNumber` 到 Swift `Bool` 的类型安全转换，使布尔属性可参与 KVO Observable 流。
classes.description_en: Conformance extension making `Bool` `KVORepresentable` by defining a type-safe conversion from KVO's `NSNumber` bridge type, enabling boolean properties to be observed via `rx.observe`.

classes.name: KVORepresentable
classes.description_zh: KVO 可表示类型协议，要求类型提供从其对应的 Objective-C KVO 桥接类型构造自身的初始化器，是 `rx.observe` 类型安全 KVO 的类型系统支撑。
classes.description_en: Protocol requiring a type to be constructible from its Objective-C KVO bridge type (`KVOType`), forming the type-system foundation for type-safe KVO observation via `rx.observe`.

classes.name: KVOObservable
classes.description_zh: `NSObject` KVO 的 Observable 实现类，订阅时通过运行时方法交叉监听指定 key path 变化并将新值发射为序列，支持强/弱引用两种目标持有模式。
classes.description_en: Internal `ObservableType` implementation that subscribes to a key path on an `NSObject` via KVO swizzling, emitting new values as elements and supporting both strong and weak retention of the observed target.

classes.name: observeWeaklyKeyPathFor
classes.signature: private func observeWeaklyKeyPathFor(_ target: NSObject, keyPath: String, options: KeyValueObservingOptions) -> Observable<AnyObject?>
classes.description_zh: 私有函数，将点分隔的多段 key path 拆解为逐级弱引用 KVO 观察链，并在最终目标释放时自动发射 `nil` 完成序列，是 `rx.observeWeakly` 的底层实现。
classes.description_en: Private function that decomposes a dot-separated key path into a chain of weak-reference KVO observations, automatically emitting `nil` and completing when the observed target deallocates — the engine behind `rx.observeWeakly`.

classes.name: isWeakProperty
classes.signature: private func isWeakProperty(_ properyRuntimeInfo: String) -> Bool

classes.name: observeWeaklyKeyPathFor
classes.signature: private func observeWeaklyKeyPathFor( _ target: NSObject, keyPathSections: [String], options: KeyValueObservingOptions ) -> Observable<AnyObject?>

classes.name: escapeTerminalString

classes.name: convertURLRequestToCurlCommand

classes.name: convertResponseToString

classes.name: Reactive
classes.description_zh: Reactive<URLSession> 扩展:提供 response/data/json 操作符,把数据任务包装成按订阅触发的 Observable,并含 curl 日志调试开关。
classes.description_en: Reactive<URLSession> extensions exposing response/data/json operators that wrap data tasks as per-subscription Observables, plus the curl-logging debug hook.

classes.name: Reactive
classes.description_zh: Reactive<URLSession> 扩展:提供 response/data/json 操作符,把数据任务包装成按订阅触发的 Observable,并含 curl 日志调试开关。
classes.description_en: Reactive<URLSession> extensions exposing response/data/json operators that wrap data tasks as per-subscription Observables, plus the curl-logging debug hook.

classes.name: BarButtonItemTarget
classes.description_zh: `UIBarButtonItem` 的 target-action 桥接器，将 bar button 的点击动作通过回调转发给 Rx 观察者，并在 `dispose` 时自动解绑 target/action。
classes.description_en: Target-action bridge for `UIBarButtonItem` that connects the bar button's action to an Rx observer callback and unregisters the target/action pair when disposed, backing the `.rx.tap` ControlEvent.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewReactiveArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 的响应式单节数组数据源，接收 Observable 发射的元素数组，更新内部模型并调用 `reloadData()` 刷新集合视图，是 `rx.items` 绑定的底层实现。
classes.description_en: Reactive single-section array data source for `UICollectionView` that receives element arrays from an Observable, updates its model store, and calls `reloadData()`, backing the `rx.items` binding operator.

classes.name: RxPickerViewArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UIPickerView` 数组数据源基类，实现 `UIPickerViewDataSource` 并持有单组 items 列表，为响应式 picker 绑定提供行数查询和模型存取接口。
classes.description_en: Base array data source for `UIPickerView` that implements `UIPickerViewDataSource` for a single component, storing items and providing row-count and model-lookup methods for reactive picker bindings.

classes.name: RxPickerViewSequenceDataSource
classes.description_zh: 扩展自 `RxPickerViewArrayDataSource` 的响应式序列数据源，遵循 `RxPickerViewDataSourceType`，在 Observable 发射新序列时更新 items 并重载所有组件。
classes.description_en: Reactive sequence data source for `UIPickerView` extending `RxPickerViewArrayDataSource`, conforming to `RxPickerViewDataSourceType`, and reloading all components whenever the bound Observable emits a new sequence.

classes.name: RxTableViewReactiveArrayDataSource
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 的响应式单节数组数据源，接收 Observable 发射的元素数组，更新内部模型并调用 `reloadData()` 刷新表格视图，是 `rx.items` 绑定的底层实现。
classes.description_en: Reactive single-section array data source for `UITableView` that receives element arrays from an Observable, updates its model store, and calls `reloadData()`, backing the `rx.items` binding operator.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewDataSourcePrefetchingProxy
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 预取数据源的代理代理，将 `collectionView(_:prefetchItemsAt:)` 回调转发为 `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>` 序列，支持 `rx.prefetchItems` 响应式绑定。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UICollectionViewDataSourcePrefetching` that relays `prefetchItemsAt` callbacks through a `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>`, backing the `rx.prefetchItems` Observable on `UICollectionView`.

classes.name: RxCollectionViewDataSourceProxy
classes.description_zh: `UICollectionView` 数据源的代理代理，拦截 `UICollectionViewDataSource` 方法并转发给响应式数据源或原始代理，是 `rx.items` 等集合视图绑定的代理层核心。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UICollectionViewDataSource` that intercepts data source calls and forwards them to the reactive data source or the original delegate, serving as the core proxy layer for `UICollectionView` reactive bindings.

classes.name: RxNavigationControllerDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UINavigationController` 委托的代理代理，将导航控制器的 `UINavigationControllerDelegate` 方法（如 push/pop 动画回调）接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UINavigationControllerDelegate` that routes navigation controller lifecycle callbacks (push/pop animations) into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxPickerViewDataSourceProxy
classes.description_zh: `UIPickerView` 数据源的代理代理，拦截 `UIPickerViewDataSource` 方法并转发给响应式数据源或原始代理，是 `rx.items` 等 picker 绑定的代理层核心。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UIPickerViewDataSource` that intercepts data source calls and forwards them to the reactive data source or original delegate, serving as the proxy layer for `UIPickerView` reactive bindings.

classes.name: RxPickerViewDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UIPickerView` 委托的代理代理，将 `UIPickerViewDelegate` 回调（行标题、视图渲染、选中等）接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UIPickerViewDelegate` that routes picker view callbacks (row titles, view rendering, selection) into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxScrollViewDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UIScrollView` 委托的代理代理，优化了 `contentOffset` 的 `BehaviorSubject`/`PublishSubject` 直接派发路径，并通过 `scrollViewDidScroll` 驱动 `rx.contentOffset` 响应式属性。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UIScrollViewDelegate` with optimized `BehaviorSubject` and `PublishSubject` paths for `contentOffset`, directly driving the `rx.contentOffset` reactive property from `scrollViewDidScroll`.

classes.name: RxSearchBarDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UISearchBar` 委托的代理代理，将 `UISearchBarDelegate` 事件（文本变化、搜索按钮点击等）接入 Observable 流，是 `rx.text`、`rx.searchButtonClicked` 等绑定的代理层。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UISearchBarDelegate` that routes search bar events (text changes, search button taps, etc.) into Observable streams, backing `rx.text` and `rx.searchButtonClicked` reactive properties.

classes.name: RxSearchControllerDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UISearchController` 委托的代理代理，将 `UISearchControllerDelegate` 回调（将展示、已展示、将关闭等）接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UISearchControllerDelegate` that routes search controller lifecycle events (will present, did present, will dismiss, etc.) into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxTabBarControllerDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITabBarController` 委托的代理代理，将标签切换、动画相关的 `UITabBarControllerDelegate` 回调接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITabBarControllerDelegate` that routes tab selection and animation callbacks into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxTabBarDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITabBar` 委托的代理代理，将 `UITabBarDelegate` 的标签项选中等回调接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITabBarDelegate` that routes tab bar item selection and related callbacks into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxTableViewDataSourcePrefetchingProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 预取数据源的代理代理，将 `tableView(_:prefetchRowsAt:)` 回调转发为 `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>` 序列，支持 `rx.prefetchRows` 响应式绑定。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITableViewDataSourcePrefetching` that relays `prefetchRowsAt` callbacks through a `PublishSubject<[IndexPath]>`, backing the `rx.prefetchRows` Observable on `UITableView`.

classes.name: RxTableViewDataSourceProxy
classes.description_zh: `UITableView` 数据源的代理代理，拦截 `UITableViewDataSource` 方法并转发给响应式数据源或原始代理，是 `rx.items` 等表格视图绑定的代理层核心。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `UITableViewDataSource` that intercepts data source calls and forwards them to the reactive data source or original delegate, serving as the core proxy layer for `UITableView` reactive bindings.

classes.name: RxTextStorageDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `NSTextStorage` 委托的代理代理，将文本存储的 `NSTextStorageDelegate` 编辑回调接入 Observable 流，支持对富文本存储变更的响应式订阅。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `NSTextStorageDelegate` that routes text storage editing callbacks into Observable streams, enabling reactive observation of `NSTextStorage` content changes.

classes.name: RxWKNavigationDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: `WKWebView` 导航委托的代理代理，将 `WKNavigationDelegate` 的页面加载生命周期回调接入 Observable 流，支持 `rx.delegate` 响应式访问。
classes.description_en: Delegate proxy for `WKNavigationDelegate` that routes `WKWebView` page-load lifecycle callbacks (did start, did finish, did fail, etc.) into Observable streams via `rx.delegate`.

classes.name: RxTextFieldDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: macOS `NSTextField` 委托的代理代理，监听 `controlTextDidChange` 通知并将文本变化转发至内部 `PublishSubject`，驱动 `rx.text` ControlProperty。
classes.description_en: macOS delegate proxy for `NSTextField` that intercepts `controlTextDidChange` notifications and forwards text values through a `PublishSubject`, backing the `rx.text` ControlProperty.

classes.name: RxTextViewDelegateProxy
classes.description_zh: macOS `NSTextView` 委托的代理代理，监听 `textDidChange` 通知并将文本变化转发至内部 `PublishSubject`，驱动 `rx.string` ControlProperty。
classes.description_en: macOS delegate proxy for `NSTextView` that intercepts `textDidChange` notifications and forwards string values through a `PublishSubject`, backing the `rx.string` ControlProperty.

layers.name: Testing Support
layers.summary: RxTest + RxBlocking — the virtual-time TestScheduler, recorded/hot/cold observables and blocking operators for deterministic tests.

classes.name: BlockingObservable
classes.description_zh: BlockingObservable 的操作符集合(toArray/first/last/single 等):阻塞当前线程直到序列终止,返回收集到的结果供测试同步断言。
classes.description_en: BlockingObservable's operator set (toArray/first/last/single/…) that blocks the current thread until the sequence terminates and returns the collected results for synchronous test assertions.

classes.name: TestScheduler
classes.description_zh: 基于 VirtualTimeScheduler 的确定性测试调度器，提供创建热/冷可观察序列、带时间戳的观察者及按虚拟时间驱动订阅生命周期的能力，专为单元测试 RxSwift 代码设计。
classes.description_en: A deterministic test scheduler extending VirtualTimeScheduler that provides factory methods for hot/cold testable observables and timestamped observers, enabling precise virtual-time control of subscription lifecycles in RxSwift unit tests.

classes.description_en: A keyed multi-value container with a three-tier storage strategy (inline fast-path, compact array, sparse dictionary) that supports O(n) insert/remove, used throughout RxSwift to manage small collections of observers and disposables.

flows.name: 委托代理桥接 · Delegate Proxy Bridge
flows.description: RxCocoa 的招牌机制:DelegateProxyType 拦截 UIKit/AppKit 的 delegate 与 dataSource 回调,派发给每个具体代理(ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView 等),将命令式回调转成 Observable 流。 · RxCocoa's signature mechanism: DelegateProxyType intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate and dataSource callbacks and dispatches to each concrete proxy (ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView …), turning imperative callbacks into Observable streams.
flows.description_zh: RxCocoa 的招牌机制:DelegateProxyType 拦截 UIKit/AppKit 的 delegate 与 dataSource 回调,派发给每个具体代理(ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView 等),将命令式回调转成 Observable 流。
flows.description_en: RxCocoa's signature mechanism: DelegateProxyType intercepts UIKit/AppKit delegate and dataSource callbacks and dispatches to each concrete proxy (ScrollView/TableView/CollectionView/PickerView …), turning imperative callbacks into Observable streams.

flows.name: 资源释放与取消 · Disposal & Cancellation
flows.description: DisposeBag 作为聚合根,统一持有并在释放时取消所有 Disposable 实现(Sink、SerialDisposable、订阅句柄等),构成 Rx 的确定性资源回收机制。 · DisposeBag is the aggregate root that holds and, on dispose, cancels every Disposable implementor (sinks, serial disposables, subscription handles), giving Rx its deterministic resource teardown.
flows.description_zh: DisposeBag 作为聚合根,统一持有并在释放时取消所有 Disposable 实现(Sink、SerialDisposable、订阅句柄等),构成 Rx 的确定性资源回收机制。
flows.description_en: DisposeBag is the aggregate root that holds and, on dispose, cancels every Disposable implementor (sinks, serial disposables, subscription handles), giving Rx its deterministic resource teardown.

flows.name: 订阅与事件分发 · Subscription & Event Dispatch
flows.description: Rx 的订阅核心:ObservableType.subscribe 委托给具体的 Producer,后者创建对应 Sink 并经 SinkDisposer 串接上下游,把推送式事件沿订阅链分发(主题亦多播给各订阅者)。 · Rx's subscription core: ObservableType.subscribe dispatches to a concrete Producer, which builds the operator's Sink and wires up/downstream through a SinkDisposer to push events along the chain (subjects multicast to their subscribers).
flows.description_zh: Rx 的订阅核心:ObservableType.subscribe 委托给具体的 Producer,后者创建对应 Sink 并经 SinkDisposer 串接上下游,把推送式事件沿订阅链分发(主题亦多播给各订阅者)。
flows.description_en: Rx's subscription core: ObservableType.subscribe dispatches to a concrete Producer, which builds the operator's Sink and wires up/downstream through a SinkDisposer to push events along the chain (subjects multicast to their subscribers).

flows.name: 主题多播 · Subject Multicasting
flows.description: 主题(Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async)既是 Observer 又是 Observable:用内部 Bag 持有订阅者,把收到的事件多播出去,是命令式代码注入 Rx 流的桥梁。 · Subjects (Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async) are both Observer and Observable: they hold subscribers in an internal Bag and multicast received events outward — the bridge that injects imperative code into Rx streams.
flows.description_zh: 主题(Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async)既是 Observer 又是 Observable:用内部 Bag 持有订阅者,把收到的事件多播出去,是命令式代码注入 Rx 流的桥梁。
flows.description_en: Subjects (Publish/Behavior/Replay/Async) are both Observer and Observable: they hold subscribers in an internal Bag and multicast received events outward — the bridge that injects imperative code into Rx streams.

flows.name: 组合最新值 · Combine Latest
flows.description: combineLatest 把多个源的最新值组合:任一源发出新元素时,用所有源各自的最新值算出组合结果,常用于聚合多路状态。 · combineLatest composes the latest values of several sources: whenever any source emits, it produces a combined result from every source's most-recent element — the workhorse for aggregating multiple states.
flows.description_zh: combineLatest 把多个源的最新值组合:任一源发出新元素时,用所有源各自的最新值算出组合结果,常用于聚合多路状态。
flows.description_en: combineLatest composes the latest values of several sources: whenever any source emits, it produces a combined result from every source's most-recent element — the workhorse for aggregating multiple states.

flows.name: 按索引配对 · Zip
flows.description: zip 按下标严格配对多个源:只有当每个源都产出第 n 个元素时才发出第 n 个组合结果,用于把并行序列对齐成元组。 · zip pairs sources strictly by index: it emits the n-th combined result only once every source has produced its n-th element, aligning parallel sequences into tuples.
flows.description_zh: zip 按下标严格配对多个源:只有当每个源都产出第 n 个元素时才发出第 n 个组合结果,用于把并行序列对齐成元组。
flows.description_en: zip pairs sources strictly by index: it emits the n-th combined result only once every source has produced its n-th element, aligning parallel sequences into tuples.

flows.name: 高阶映射与合并 · FlatMap & Merge
flows.description: flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge 等高阶操作符把"序列的序列"展开:经 FlatMapSink 订阅内层 Observable 并把其元素合流到下游,是 Rx 异步编排的枢纽。 · The higher-order operators (flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge) flatten an observable-of-observables: a FlatMapSink subscribes to each inner Observable and merges its elements downstream — the hub of Rx async orchestration.
flows.description_zh: flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge 等高阶操作符把"序列的序列"展开:经 FlatMapSink 订阅内层 Observable 并把其元素合流到下游,是 Rx 异步编排的枢纽。
flows.description_en: The higher-order operators (flatMap/flatMapFirst/concatMap/merge) flatten an observable-of-observables: a FlatMapSink subscribes to each inner Observable and merges its elements downstream — the hub of Rx async orchestration.
